_note: City Jump from Kansas City perspective. Scores reflect travel ease, match quality, and city energy FROM KC.

cities.name: Kansas City
cities.hotelNote: Book now — Quarterfinal weekend will be impossible to find last-minute.
cities.bestFor: Your home turf and a World Cup Quarterfinal. This is the crown jewel.

cities.name: Dallas
cities.hotelNote: Affordable outside downtown Arlington. Book early for Final weekend.
cities.bestFor: Closest major host city. Shares Group J with KC (Argentina, Algeria). AT&T Stadium hosts the Final.

cities.name: Houston
cities.hotelNote: Reasonably priced. NRG area has many options.
cities.bestFor: Another short flight option from KC. Different groups than KC.

cities.name: Mexico City
cities.hotelNote: Affordable compared to US cities. Currency is favorable for US travelers.
cities.bestFor: Azteca hosts the opening match (Mexico vs South Africa, June 11). Bucket-list venue from KC in under 3 hrs.

cities.name: Los Angeles
cities.hotelNote: Expensive. Consider Airbnb in Inglewood or nearby Hollywood Park.
cities.bestFor: USA opens its World Cup here vs Paraguay. Top-tier match quality.

cities.name: Seattle
cities.hotelNote: Book early — Seattle hotels are expensive during match weeks.
cities.bestFor: USA vs Australia and Egypt vs Iran night match. R16 at Lumen Field. Pacific Northwest energy.

cities.name: Vancouver
cities.hotelNote: Reasonably priced vs US cities. Canadian dollar is favorable.
cities.bestFor: Canada HQ. Group B (Canada, Switzerland, Qatar, Bosnia). International experience without leaving North America.

cities.name: Atlanta
cities.hotelNote: Good hotel options downtown near the stadium.
cities.bestFor: Southeast hub. Different groups than KC. World-class soccer venue.
